title: Add temporary forceSetMeAsSuperAdmin function to backend

quotes: Tambahkan function sementara berikut ke backend. Jangan ubah logic lain. Jangan ubah struktur data.

acceptanceCriteria: The function `forceSetMeAsSuperAdmin` is present in backend/main.mo as a public shared method.
Calling the function updates the caller's role to `#super_admin` in `adminStore`.
All other admin records in `adminStore` remain unchanged after the call.
The function returns the string "Role updated to super_admin for caller" on success.
No existing backend functions, data structures, or state variables are modified.

constraints: Do not modify any existing backend logic, functions, or data structures.
Do not change the adminStore schema or any other data model.
Do not add or remove any frontend files or logic.
nonGoals: Exposing this function in the frontend UI.
Adding any authorization/guard to this temporary function.
Removing or replacing any existing admin role management logic.
